title: Halal Medjool Delight
description: A mediterranean date-night dish featuring umami-rich dates and currants, infused with Mediterranean flavors for a delicious dessert.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon honey
ingredients.notes: Optional, for a touch of sweetness if desired

ingredients.name: 6 oz fresh currants
ingredients.notes: Use either dried or fresh if preferred, ensure they are not overly wet

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine honey and lemon juice. Bring to a simmer over medium heat for about 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, pit the dates and place them in a bowl with prunes, pitted walnuts, salt, and remaining olive oil. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish or a baking pan that can fit all ingredients evenly distributed.
Pour the honey-lemon sauce over the top of the date-walnut-prune mixture. Sprinkle fresh currants on top if using.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes, until golden and bubbly around the edges.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving with Greek yogurt or a scoop of ice cream for a perfect mediterranean date-night treat.
